title: Propagate phoenix_ecto_sandbox from connect_info to socket assigns
prompt: Write `lib/my_app_web/channels/user_socket.ex` as a `Phoenix.Socket` that defines `connect(params, socket, connect_info)` extracting the sandbox metadata. The connect function must: (1) decode `connect_info[:user_agent]` via `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.decode_metadata/1`, (2) assign the decoded metadata to the socket as `:phoenix_ecto_sandbox`, (3) return `{:ok, socket}`. Channel tests will then read this assign in join/3 to call allow/2.
tier_rationale: Multi-step — requires knowing decode_metadata exists and where to store the result.
